paper_record.title: Giant Room-Temperature Third-Order Electrical Transport in a Thin-Film Altermagnet Candidate
paper_record.abstract: Quantum geometry, a quantum mechanical quantity comprised of Berry curvature and quantum metric, describes the geometric structure of the electronic bands in solids. The correlation between nontrivial quantum geometry and quantum materials leads to new findings in condensed matter systems. Here we demonstrate that altermagnets, with spontaneously broken time-reversal (T)- half-lattice-translation and parity-time symmetry, host both T-odd and T-even quantum geometric quantities that simultaneously manifest themselves despite the vanishing net magnetization. Consequently, giant room-temperature third-order electrical transport responses with sizable quantum geometric contributions are observed in (101)-oriented RuO2 thin films, an altermagnetic candidate; in particular, the third-order Hall effect is intimately correlated with altermagnetic order and can serve as a promising tool for detecting the Neel vector. Our work not only supports the existence of altermagnetism in 8-nm-thick RuO2 thin films, but also shows altermagnets as a versatile platform for exploring quantum geometry and constructing quantum electronic and spintronic devices.

one_sentence_summary.zh: 在室温下观测到候选交错磁体 RuO2 薄膜中由量子几何诱导的巨三阶电输运效应。
one_sentence_summary.en: Observation of giant room-temperature third-order electrical transport induced by quantum geometry in altermagnetic RuO2 thin films.

problem.zh: 探索交错磁体中由对称性破缺诱导的 T-odd 和 T-even 量子几何效应，并寻找探测无净磁矩系统磁序的非线性输运手段。
problem.en: Exploring T-odd and T-even quantum geometric effects induced by symmetry breaking in altermagnets and finding nonlinear transport tools to probe magnetic order in compensated systems.

approach.zh: 制备 (101) 取向 RuO2 外延薄膜，进行谐波输运测量，结合场冷实验、对称性分析和第一性原理计算，研究三阶纵向与横向响应的物理起源。
approach.en: Fabricating (101)-oriented RuO2 epitaxial films, performing harmonic transport measurements, and combining field-cooling, symmetry analysis, and DFT calculations to study the origins of third-order responses.

main_takeaway.zh: RuO2 薄膜表现出显著的室温三阶霍尔效应，该效应具有 T-odd 特性且随 Néel 矢量重新分布而反转，可作为探测交错磁序的灵敏工具。
main_takeaway.en: RuO2 thin films exhibit a giant room-temperature third-order Hall effect that is T-odd and reverses with Néel vector redistribution, serving as a sensitive probe for altermagnetic order.

why_it_matters.zh: 该研究证明了交错磁体是研究量子几何和构建室温量子电子器件的理想平台，为全反铁磁自旋电子学提供了新的探测维度。
why_it_matters.en: This work demonstrates altermagnets as a versatile platform for exploring quantum geometry and building room-temperature quantum devices, adding a new dimension to antiferromagnetic spintronics.

reason.zh: 首次在实验上将交错磁体的非线性输运与量子几何张量的高阶项联系起来，并实现了室温下的巨响应。
reason.en: First experimental link between nonlinear transport in altermagnets and higher-order quantum geometric tensors, achieving giant responses at room temperature.

reason.zh: 该研究结合了交错磁体这一热门领域与量子几何输运，且具有显著的室温实验结果和明确的物理机制。
reason.en: The study combines the hot field of altermagnetism with quantum geometric transport, featuring significant room-temperature experimental results and clear physical mechanisms.
